meta.name: template-loop-until-done
meta.description: TEMPLATE (pattern): repeat a unit of work until a goal condition holds or progress stalls. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: Unknown-size work with a checkable goal — fix failing tests until green, hunt bugs until two dry rounds

args.goal: string (required) — <the condition that ends the loop, checkable by an agent>

steps.stopCondition: <e.g. all tests pass / two consecutive rounds find nothing new>
steps.noProgressCondition: <e.g. two consecutive rounds with no improvement in the metric>

body.does: make one round of progress toward {goal}: <e.g. fix the next failing test>; report what changed and the current metric

steps.does: summarize {roundReports}: goal reached or why we stopped, and what remains

end.review: <e.g. the goal metric verified independently, plus a round-by-round trail>
